poseAuthority.mainFinding: The active Three.js player renderer creates and applies a legacy procedural pose directly from committed RunState scalars. Installed articulated motion and articulated dynamics surfaces are not admitted into the visible pose, and no pose commit identifies the skeleton shown.
requiredProof: one visible player frame cites one admitted pose commit
run generation and tick cannot regress
body profile rig and skeleton identities agree
motion physics and optional dynamics inputs are recorded
articulated solve failure cannot fall through silently
unknown or missing bones produce a typed coverage result
legacy fallback is explicit and revisioned
public readback returns the pose shown
source build and Pages visible-frame fixtures agree
